programme.title: Survivor 50
programme.desc: A record 24 castaways return to Fiji for this milestone 50th anniversary season, ranging from multi-season legends to New Era standouts.

programme.title: Planet Action S4
programme.desc: Planet Action takes you behind the scenes of the best action movies released. Each episode you'll get all the secrets straight from your favorite action heroes, get exclusive trivia and special reports from the most dangerous film sets, and get insight information on how the filmmakers make giant monsters come to life. This show is a sci-fi, cowboy, world-destruction, action-combo that will literally blow your mind!

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: Aluminium foil is a kitchen staple. But with concerns about metal leaching, how safe is foil for cooking? Diana Ser conducts a test to find out how much aluminium is leaching into our food.

programme.title: On The Red Dot
programme.desc: On The Red Dot offers weekly in-depth analysis and discussion on key issues and events that matter to Singaporeans.

programme.title: Arts 21
programme.desc: ARTS 21 is an arts magazine show focusing on the latest news and events on the culture scene.

programme.title: Euromaxx
programme.desc: Everything you've ever wanted to know about Europe - from traditions and habits to culture shocks and record breakers.

programme.title: The Chase S16
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef's Line?

programme.title: Food Tales S1
programme.desc: Food Tales explores the incredible life stories of Singapore's local hawker heroes featured in the annual food and music extravaganza: GastroBeats. With a diverse mix of influences stemming from waves of immigration to a tiny island, Singapore's culinary landscape represents the beating heart of the nation.

programme.desc: The Big Q S3.

programme.title: Count TV
programme.desc: COUNT TV makes math fun for kids! Hosted by Randall and Andy, the two find themselves in all kinds of quizzical, mathematical situations each week. And it's up to them to figure out the solutions!

programme.title: Catch! Teenieping
programme.desc: (Dual Language English and Mandarin) (Dual Language English and Chinese) Princess Romi accidentally let go of her magical fairies, called Teeniepings. She and her friends are now on a mission to catch all her Teeniepings!

programme.title: Catch! Teenieping
programme.desc: (Dual Language English and Mandarin) (Dual Language English and Chinese) Princess Romi accidentally let go of her magical fairies, called Teeniepings. She and her friends are now on a mission to catch all her Teeniepings!

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs S2
programme.desc: In this prequel to the 2009 film, inventor boy Flint Lockwood and reporter girl Sam Sparks as best friends during high school!

programme.title: Pokemon Horizons: Season 2 -The Search for Laqua
programme.desc: In order to learn and master Terastallization, Liko, Roy, and Dot have joined the Naranja Academy's "Tera Training"! They meet Clavell, the school's director, and Geeta, the chairwoman of Paldea's Pokmon League as well as the Elite Four of Paldea: Rika, Poppy, Larry , and Hassel. And so begins their adventure in Paldea Region, setting their sights on their Terastallization debut!

programme.title: Game On
programme.desc: A Southeast Asian Games kayaking athlete trades in his paddle for a basketball in this high-energy challenge. With no experience on the court, he must quickly learn the fundamentals---dribbling, shooting, and even trying for a slam dunk.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Go Rush!!
programme.desc: Twins Yuhi and Yuamu Ohdo believe there's alien life beyond the stars, even though their attempts to prove it have only ended in failure their hard work and dedication are about to pay off when an extraterrestrial finally arrives on Earth!

programme.title: Dragons: Riders Of Berk S1
programme.desc: The Vikings of Berk must learn to live alongside dragons. Hiccup and his friends establish the Dragon Academy to train dragons and defend the island from new enemies, primarily the Outcast Tribe led by Alvin the Treacherous.

programme.title: Beyblade X S2
programme.desc: Don't miss the continuing adventures as Beyblade pros from around the world gather to compete in the Pro League held inside the X Tower!

programme.title: P. King Duckling Adventure Buds
programme.desc: This series features three good friends, P. For the Adventure Buds, life is all about making every day crazy fun - taking any idea or activity and making it an awesome adventure!

programme.title: Game On
programme.desc: What happens when Singapore's national athletes swap roles with a group of fearless young coaches? In Game On, seasoned pros face the ultimate challenge---being trained by kids to compete in a completely new sport. Will they rise to the occasion or be outplayed by their new mentors?

programme.desc: The exhilarating hit game show where contestants must beat The Banker to win a huge cash prize, is making a triumphant return. The ultimate contest of nerve, luck and pure gut instinct will be fronted by one of Australia's most beloved TV presenters, Gold Logie winner Grant Denyer.

programme.title: Animal Impossible
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. Pastry chef and food writer Ravneet Gill and Bake Off alumnus Liam Charles return to judge the efforts of more budding bakers. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.desc: Contestants must battle to win a top prize of 250,000 pounds and each of them must complete apparently simple tasks while under the spotlight in a large perspex cube. Each task is worth a prize and the contestants will have to work hard to stay in the game.

programme.title: Crimewatch 2026
programme.desc: Don't do it! Three offenders go on a shop theft spree when a vigilant retail staff reports them to the Police. Watch how officers from Clementi Division track down and arrest the offenders.

programme.title: Big Little Journeys
programme.desc: Follow the real-life adventures of six tiny animals as they journey into the unknown – across rainforests, mountains and wetlands. The cast of animals includes a family of endangered golden-headed lion tamarins in Brazil, gymnastic bushbabies in South Africa and the rare Taiwanese Formosan pangolin – the world's most trafficked animal.

programme.title: Haikal Nak Jadi Cef
programme.desc: Haikal and Zaidi decide to create a dish together while Haikal's father is at work. The trouble begins when Haikal decides to use a blowtorch for the finishing touch. However, his inexperience gets the best of him, and the flame quickly spirals out of control, igniting the ingredients in a fiery blaze. Mr Tan, their neighbour, comes to the rescue and swiftly extinguishes the flames in time. Haikal is banned from lighting fire in the house unless Raian is around to supervise.

After crossing the 10th door, the team enter their Prize Vault to collect their winning amount. Contestants stand to win up to 10,000 worth of cash and prizes.

programme.title: Siapa Terror?!
programme.desc: This is the story about two sisters, Hamimah and Halina who lead very materialistic lives. They are always 'competing' against each other to see who has better 'placing' in life and status. They also tend to disregard their husband's say or advice. Hamimah practically bullies the husband (Azhar) with emotional blackmail and harsh words. Halina treats her husband (Sham) like a remote control. Their attitudes have taken a toll on their marriage.

programme.title: Arya
programme.desc: Weighed down by guilt, Arya meets Nandhini, Suresh's widowed wife, further realizing the extent of his actions and their consequences. Haunted by nightmares, he struggles to find a path to redemption, with his mother guiding him toward clarity. Can Arya ever escape the haunting grip of his past?

programme.title: Arya
programme.desc: After meeting his mentor, who helps him recognize his life's purpose and a path to redemption, Arya enters the prison. Though initially frustrated by the juvenile boys' lack of skill and poor attitude, he begins to show a newfound sense of empathy toward them. Is this change in Arya for the better or is he losing himself in the process?

programme.title: Pinky Promise Thozhi
programme.desc: While handling a custody case for young Sharvin, Jhanagee's past resurfaces when her former love, Siddarth, returns with a family of his own. Torn between duty and emotion, she confronts the ache of unresolved love and the haunting truth that some bonds — no matter time or distance — are written by destiny.

programme.title: Pinky Promise Thozhi
programme.desc: Jhanagee's world unravels when a hidden notebook exposes her grandmother's secrets and a late-night knock reopens old wounds. As a custody battle turns chaotic and young Sharvin disappears, guilt and truth blur, forcing Jhanagee to confront her past and question where justice truly lies — in the law or the heart.

programme.title: King of Culinary S2
programme.desc: It's Celebrity Chefs vs Super Homecooks! Get ready for a fun and fiery cook-off as Raja Kaiya Vecha returns with a new season. These 10-week competition will see amateur homecooks from all walks of life displaying their culinary talents, with a group of illustrious mentor and mentee chefs standing in their way, as these homecooks strive to emerge to be the King of Culinary. Winner stands a chance to win cash prize.

programme.title: Irugapatru
programme.desc: The perfect life of a marriage counsellor becomes complicated by her own methods and techniques. There are ups and downs with two other couples as she returns to her happy married life.

programme.title: Samaippoma S2
programme.desc: Samaippoma [Cookery Show] two dishes are presented in an entertaining way every episode, with lots of new varieties.

programme.title: Indian Beat S17
programme.desc: Indian Beat is a bilingual magazine programme that showcases activities and events organised by Indian organisations and community groups across Singapore. It highlights community and youth initiatives, celebrates cultural happenings, and brings audiences closer to local stories through engaging coverage across media.

programme.title: Seithi
programme.desc: (Live) Tamil Seithi focuses primarily on local and international news, information and current affairs. Catch the online news portal at http://seithi.mediacorp.sg/.

programme.title: Behindwoods Golden Legs of India
programme.desc: Behindwoods Golden Legs of India" - National-level hunt to identify the finest dancing talent. The First-ever Digital platform Dance competition dedicated to celebrate the art of dance like never before. Special Performance: Prabhu Deva Master, Music Director DSP, Dance Master Sandy, Dance Master Baba Baskar, Dance Master Sridhar, Vijay TV Amir, Vijay TV Pugazh Sunitha, Ditya Bhande, Jaffar, Baba jackson, Actress Brigida (Iravin Nizhal).
